requirement_text: The device shall respond to the PING command with OK PONG.
The device shall report its current state when GET_STATE is received.
The device shall reject SET_STATE values outside the range 0 to 2.
The system shall respond to a PING command within 15 milliseconds.
The system shall return 'ERR UNKNOWN_CMD' when it receives an unrecognized command.
The system shall reject UART frames exceeding 128 bytes with the response 'ERR LINE_TOO_LONG'.
The system shall reject transitions directly from FAILSAFE (2) to ACTIVE (1) with 'ERR ILLEGAL_TRANSITION'.
The system shall respond to the VERSION command with 'OK VERSION 0.1'.
The system shall correctly transition through all valid states sequentially.
The system shall return to STANDBY state when SET_STATE 0 is received from any state.
The system shall treat commands as case-sensitive and reject lowercase variants.
The system shall reject SET_STATE commands with non-integer arguments.
The system shall handle commands with leading or trailing whitespace gracefully.
The system shall remain stable and responsive after 50 consecutive PING commands.
The system shall recover and respond correctly after receiving an invalid command.
The system shall boot into the STANDBY state by default.
The system state shall not change as a result of an invalid command.
